content.en:
As Ye Tian passed the seventh round of assessment of the Xuanxing Holy Gate, it also meant that Ye Tian completely possessed the supreme authority of this Xuanxing Holy Gate Ruins and controlled this Xuanxing Holy Gate Ruins.

"Congratulations to the examiners for passing the seventh round of assessment and obtaining the highest authority for this ruin. "

Airplanes!!!

Countless pieces of information poured into Ye Tian's will, allowing him to completely control this ruin.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the depths of the ruins of this Xuanxing Holy Gate, and here, he walked into the interior of a large hall, which stored multiple inheritances.

Nine Upper Grade Realm Spiritual Inheritance, Sixteen Medium Grade Realm Spiritual Inheritance

There are also a bunch of lower-grade realm spirit inheritance, but the lower-grade realm spirit is of little value, and the eternal realm spirit that is condensed without breaking through the method of eternal realm spirit inheritance is also a lower-grade eternal realm spirit.

It can only be said that if you obtain the inheritance of the inferior Eternal Realm Spirit, the success rate will be a little higher, and the quality of the Eternal Realm Spirit will also be a little higher.

What is really valuable is the inheritance of the medium-grade Eternal Realm Spirit and the top-grade Eternal Realm Spirit.

Of course, Ye Tian would not be able to cultivate these top-grade Eternal Realm Spirits, but he was able to deduce and refine the top-grade Eternal Realm Spirits to perfection.

Other than that.

These top-grade Eternal Realm Spirits now belong to him completely, and he can pass them on to the Terrans, and let the Eternal Realm Divine Realms of the Terran Race cultivate the inheritance methods of these top-grade Eternal Realm Spirits, so as to condense the top-grade Eternal Realm Spirits. 963

In addition to these Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritances, this Xuanxing Holy Gate Ruins also has a large number of resource treasures, as well as Eternal Realm Treasures.

"So many treasure resources!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

There are many treasures here, many of which are helpful to strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed and solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, and they are all the kind with very few side effects, which can completely strengthen the human race and make the human race cultivate a lot of Eternal Realm God Realm in a short period of time.

In addition to this, there are resources that will help cultivate the spirits of the eternal realm.

Like this one.

Ye Tian took out a small colorful tree from these treasures, this is a kind of treasure that is famous in the realm of the Realm God Realm - the Colorful Lotus Tree, this kind of treasure tree can be placed in the Eternal Dao Seed, which can assist in cultivating the Eternal Realm Spirit, and the success rate is extremely high.

If Ye Tian used it to cultivate the Eternal Realm Spirit, the success rate would reach one hundred percent.

Of course, if this colorful lotus tree is used once, it will almost be scrapped, and it is extremely difficult to restore it, and it will take an infinite number of years and a lot of resources to restore it.

But even so, this treasure still made countless Eternal Realm God Realms crazy.

"The Xuanxing Holy Gate is worthy of being a top force, and so many good things have been preserved in just one ruin!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, Ye Tian selected some things from these treasures and prepared to bring them back to the Endless Kingdom Alliance and the Terran Holy Kingdom.

And he also chose an Eternal Realm Treasure weapon for himself.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian chose a battle suit, the Voidless Holy Clothes, which was a defensive Eternal Realm Treasure, and it was also a very top-notch defensive Eternal Realm Treasure, which could greatly enhance his defense.

As for the other attack-type weapons, he didn't have any choices, and they were not as good as his Chilin Ancient Spear, so there was no way to increase his combat power.

In a short time, Ye Tian had selected the treasures, and then left from this floating realm.

In the past, his cultivation level was very low, and there was no way to directly tear the barrier between the floating realm and the eternal realm, but now he could do it.

Wow!

Ye Tian stretched out his hand and swiped it, tearing through the barrier between the floating realm and the eternal realm, and returned to the eternal realm.

Then, he returned to the Endless Realm Alliance and placed a batch of resources in the Terran Sanctuary so that the powerhouses of the Terran could exchange these resources.

Of course, he also sent a batch of resources to the Terran (CGDJ) Holy Country, and also let the powerhouses of the Human Race Holy Kingdom exchange these resources.

Even, even the top-grade Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, he also got the Terran Temple, once the Terran broke through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, he could exchange it for the top-grade Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance.

......

In the following days, Ye Tian began to use the Tianyan Roulette Wheel to deduce and improve more Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Methods, and perfect them to the perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Method.

He needed more methods of inheritance of the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, so that every Eternal Realm Spirit condensed in the future would be a Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit.

In this way, the years continued to slip, and Ye Tian also continued to deduce, perfecting one perfect eternal realm spirit method after another.

Of course, he is also constantly refining and improving the Eternal Dao Seed, striving to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit as soon as possible.

Gradually, Ye Tian perfected five perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Methods, plus the four Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Methods that he had perfected before, he now had nine perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Methods.

"The ruins of the Xuanxing Holy Gate have a total of nine top-grade Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Methods, and you can easily perfect the Nine Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Methods, but then if you want to perfect the tenth Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Method, it will be many times more difficult, and it will take longer!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had completely raised the Eternal Dao Seed to his current limit, and at this time, he could cultivate the fourth Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit and impact the Eternal Realm Divine Realm Intermediate Cultivator.

Subsequently.

He began to cultivate in the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and made a breakthrough in the Terran Holy Kingdom.

......

After everything was ready, Ye Tian began to hit the bottleneck.

And this time, he also prepared various resources, among which there was a treasure like the Nine Colored Lotus Tree, with this treasure, it was guaranteed that he could get through the weak period in an instant.

"Let's get started!"

This time, Ye Tian cultivated the Tianyan Ancient Phoenix, a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

I saw that he was constantly extracting the power of the Eternal Dao Seed and condensing the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit in accordance with the requirements of the Tianyan Ancient Phoenix Inheritance Law, and in this process, the Nine Colored Lotus Tree was also playing a role.

Gradually, an illusory Tianyan Ancient Phoenix condensed, and his Eternal Dao Seed was absorbed too much energy, which made the Eternal Dao Seed weak, but the Nine Colored Treasure Lotus Tree played a role, allowing his Eternal Dao Seed to gradually recover, and making the Tianyan Ancient Phoenix more and more condensed, and soon completely stabilized.

Finally.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's fourth perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, Tianyan Ancient Phoenix, was completely condensed successfully, and his cultivation began to officially break through!.
